# Overhauled.ai

> Websites and AI automation for small businesses everywhere.

Overhauled.ai is a web design and AI automation studio run by Mark Hurson, based in Guelph, Ontario, Canada. We help small business owners get professional websites built fast, fix sites that are losing leads, and add AI-powered automation that handles the repetitive work — all at flat-rate prices with no tech jargon.

## What We Do

Three core packages:

- **Lead Leak Audit ($297)**: A full diagnostic of your existing website — what's broken, what's costing you leads, and what to fix first. Delivered in 48 hours. If nothing needs fixing, we tell you that.
- **Lead Machine (from $2,997)**: A fast, mobile-first, SEO-ready website built to convert. Flat rate, you own everything, no ongoing fees.
- **Autopilot Plan (from $397/month)**: AI agents and automation for your business — instant lead replies, quote follow-up, appointment booking, FAQ handling, and after-hours coverage. Flat monthly rate, cancel anytime.

## Who We Serve

Small business owners everywhere — especially trades, service businesses, clinics, consultants, and local retailers who want their website to work harder and their inbox to stop running their day.

## Pricing

- Lead Leak Audit: $297 (one-time, 48-hour turnaround)
- Lead Machine: from $2,997 (one-time, flat rate, you own everything)
- Autopilot Plan: from $397/month (flat monthly, cancel anytime)

Full pricing details: https://overhauled.ai/#pricing
Machine-readable pricing: https://overhauled.ai/pricing.md

- Serving: Small businesses everywhere

## Recent Client Work

- **PizzaCam Guelph** (pizzacam.ca) — Website for a viral 24/7 robot pizza kiosk at University of Guelph; 1M+ total social reach
- **Guelph Dumpster Rental** (guelphdumpsterrental.com) — Conversion-focused trades site with automated lead follow-up
- **ToteRental.ca** — Online booking and pricing system for a moving tote rental service
- **Cheap Eats Guelph** (cheapeatsguelph.com) — Fully automated local food deals site, zero manual maintenance
